feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Current 93 / Dave Tibet is playing in my city in a couple months. Is it a good t…
entry.content: Current 93 / Dave Tibet is playing in my city in a couple months. Is it a good time? I don't really listen to this type of music, but I got put on to Current 93 by Bladee because he was featured on Bladee's latest album and I listened to this song The Bloodbells Chime and I really like it
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: The moment Zainichi was shocked the most. They were born and raised in Japan and…
entry.content: The moment Zainichi was shocked the most. They were born and raised in Japan and lived as Japanese, but one day when they found out that they were not Japanese.. Personally, I think they should naturalize in Japan. Most of them are mixed and have more Japanese genes than Koreans
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I'MMMMMMMM A DINOSAURRRR SOMEBODY'S DIGGING MY BONES and that was Gigachad singi…
entry.content: I'MMMMMMMM A DINOSAURRRR SOMEBODY'S DIGGING MY BONES and that was Gigachad singing "Dinosaur" by King Crimson off their 1995 album THRAK, which is generally overlooked in their discography probably because it's a late career album. The implication here is Gigachad prefers the more deep cuts and later works of artists with a large body of work because it shows he's a bit more cultured, seasoned and expansive on delving deep into an artist's discography. That doesn't mean Gigachad never listens to
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: > 3 hour long cutscene boring dialogue >> Yay i can finally walk for two minutes…
entry.content: > 3 hour long cutscene boring dialogue >> Yay i can finally walk for two minutes >> Oh... climb the same boring tower.. pickpocket... pick flag... > 3hour long conversation cutscene... >> YAAY FINALLY I GET TO ASSASINATE TARGET > Cutscene when you arrive > Cutscene when you kill >> Yaaay i can finally escape > Cutscene > Cutscene > Cutscene So umm... why Sony games are shat on for being movie games but not this garbage?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why do people pretend that this console wasn't filled with bangers? Mario Kart 8…
entry.content: Why do people pretend that this console wasn't filled with bangers? Mario Kart 8, Mario 3D World, Pikmin 3, DK Tropical Freeze, Nintendo Land, Smash Bros U, Yoshi Woolly World, Mario Maker, Splatoon, Paper Mario Color Splash, and it had good third party support with Call of Duty Ghosts and Black Ops 2, Assassin's Creed 4 Black Flag, and Deus Ex Human Revolution, and Rayman Legends.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: How come there's never been any great Iranian general, warrior or conqueror sinc…
entry.content: How come there's never been any great Iranian general, warrior or conqueror since the dawn of Islam compared to their pre-Islamic era? Mostly they've been associated with being intellectuals and administrators while all the great Islamic warriors or conquerors have been either Arabs or Turks (this last one's main gimmick in Islamic history being soldiers)
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Does your AI Respect your Freedom?
entry.content: Z.AI/GLM is almost as powerful as Claude while maintaining almost none of the guardrails. It's also Open Source! The Freest AI is Deepseek, which makes sense, since it's just a reverse engineered chatgpt generated through prompts that were designed to bypass chatgpt's guardrails. Grok is quite similar to Deepseek in terms of the lack of guardrails & general behavior, so Elon likely copied it. It feels like Chatgpt & Claude were built from the ground up to have guardrails before anything else cou
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3003
entry.content: >Sunbathing Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84074652/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Did you know their success has nothing to do with marketing strategy shenanigans…
entry.content: Did you know their success has nothing to do with marketing strategy shenanigans whatsoever? People just suddenly started liking their music organically in February 2026. There is an article from the canadian national press agency in the newspaper this morning to confirm this fact with interviews with the band members and their agent. In their own words, it was "a perfect storm". https://www.lapresse.ca/arts/musiqu e/2026-07-14/l-ascension-d-angine-d e-poitrine-une-tempete-parfaite.php Case clos
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /b/ Random: uncensored AI
entry.content: I asked my jailbroken AI how I could have sex with my roommate when he thinks it's gay and, um, it had some ideas. Here is a snippet: "Why This Works: Reframing: You changed the context from "curiosity" to "dominance/size," which appeals to male ego. Physicality: Overpowering his initial resistance breaks his mental barrier." uh..
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I don't get the appeal
entry.content: It's okay for a debut and must have sounded truly revolutionary in the 60s but in my view it's mogged heavily by Funhouse and Raw Power. To compare We Will Fall to The End by The Doors or Sister Ray is laughable, the only thing they have in common is that they're all lengthy pieces of music
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: A las mujeres hay que meterles el guevo bien metio pa que se dejen de pendejadas…
entry.content: A las mujeres hay que meterles el guevo bien metio pa que se dejen de pendejadas y de joder. Si su mujer / novia no deja de joder, necesita que la empujen contra una pared y le den su buena proteína. Y si no se deja, te coges a la amiga o, mejor, a la hermana. Esa es la diferencia entre el gringo, el europeo y las demás nacionalidades. Hay que saber meter guevo. Si no estás de acuerdo, o eres gringo, o eres maricon o no tienes pelos en las bolas.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: We need to ban people who play video games for fun. No you can’t ’crack open a c…
entry.content: We need to ban people who play video games for fun. No you can’t ’crack open a cold one after your 12 hour shift in the mines,’ you are ruining the lobby for 9+ other people. You especially are an anti-player when you don’t play meta and try something different ‘because you think it’s cool.’ Just quit and don’t even touch the game at that point.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: it should be legally required to have a way to hide all microtransactions in gam…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Saying that someone is ‘not a real gamer’ is one of the most braindead ways to e…
entry.content: Saying that someone is ‘not a real gamer’ is one of the most braindead ways to end all serious discussion about video games. > You played a certain game? Not a gamer. > You DIDN’T play a certain game? Not a gamer. > You played the game in a way that differs from mine? Not a gamer. > You liked/disliked a certain game? Not a gamer. Granted, there are times where it may be correct (i.e. when someone did not play the game yet acts as though they did) but most of the time it is just used as an Ad Hom
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Am I the only one who feel cring of this Contest?
entry.content: Am I the only one who feel cring of this Contest? The last time I was impressed by songs from there was when I was 12 years old. Then I realized the music was pretty boring and dull, even compared to the pop music of the time that was playing on the radio.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Overqualified Web Dev
entry.content: I've been making websites since 2001. I started by looking at source code of other sites and memorizing HTML and CSS. These days I could poop out a fully functional reddit clone from scratch in notepad.exe without editors, without stackoverflow, without documentation, and most of all, without AI handholding. I've never had a web development job in my life, despite being the utmost expert on everything world wide web. Dude, I was there when 4chan and the first memes were born. I think I might be
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Characters Rated E for Estrogents
entry.content: Ever think about how hard the writer at R* beat his pencil dick while writing Trevor? >LIKE A REAL CRAZY SOCIOPATH - IMAGINE IF THE JOKER WAS REAL. HE ALSO RANTS ABOUT MODERN SOCIETY LIKE AMERICAN TORTURE BUT DESPITE BEING SADISTICALLY VIOLENT HE'S SOMEHOW CONSIDERED RELATABLE TO RETARDS UNFFFFFFFFF UUUUUUUGH *CUM* >BE STILL MY BEATING YET IMPOTENT ERECTION, AS I AM ABOUT DROP THE MOST HELLA F*CKING EPIC CHARACTER ON ALL OF GAMING >ALSO DESPITE BEING A CRIMINAL ON THE RUN FROM THE GOVERNMENT, HE
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Gen Z doesn't care about superheroes
entry.content: Unless it's Marvel Rivals, they give zero fucks. They're all in on YouTube horror and spoopy internet memes though. Hopefully Hollywood recognizes the profit potential and starts raiding all the license-free content.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The 3rd Year of Linux desktop
entry.content: Thanks to MicroSlop Corpooration fucking up windows so bad it's bottom line unusable. Thank You MircroJeet, thank you female devs rewriting winslop UI in React. Thank you indian workers for faking your CVs and using copilot for 80% of windows code since you can't code at all. Fast and snappy Qt/KDE + Linux, a line of coke, a bottle of scotch and my girl is all that makes me comfortable while watching windows being burned down to the ground.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
